# DRMLSurv

![](reference/figures/logo.png)

DRMLSurv is an R package for two-stage survival analysis with censoring,
matching-based imputation, counterfactual outcome construction, and
machine-learning estimation of dynamic treatment rules.

Main features include:

- donor-based imputation of censored stage-1 and stage-2 survival times
- matched counterfactual outcome construction under alternative
  treatment paths
- policy learning with random forests and cross-validation
- policy summary metrics and balance diagnostics

## Installation

``` r
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("EricAnto0/DRMLSurv")
```

# load package

``` r
library(DRMLSurv)
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`ComputeScores()`](https://ericanto0.github.io/DRMLSurv/reference/ComputeScores.md)
  : Compute propensity and prognostic scores (treatment- or
  censoring-based)

- [`DATASET`](https://ericanto0.github.io/DRMLSurv/reference/DATASET.md)
  :

  Two-stage example Small example dataset for demonstrating matching,
  censoring imputation, and treatment-rule learning functions in
  DRMLSurv.

- [`Drmatch()`](https://ericanto0.github.io/DRMLSurv/reference/Drmatch.md)
  : Two-stage DTR learning/evaluation pipeline with cross-fitting

- [`get_doublescores()`](https://ericanto0.github.io/DRMLSurv/reference/get_doublescores.md)
  : Compute stage-specific treatment propensity and prognostic “double
  scores”

- [`impute_censored_outcomes()`](https://ericanto0.github.io/DRMLSurv/reference/impute_censored_outcomes.md)
  : Impute censored stage-specific outcomes via matching with optional
  learned censoring scores

- [`impute_censored_stage1()`](https://ericanto0.github.io/DRMLSurv/reference/impute_censored_stage1.md)
  : Impute censored stage-1 composite outcomes via constrained donor
  matching

- [`impute_censored_stage2()`](https://ericanto0.github.io/DRMLSurv/reference/impute_censored_stage2.md)
  : Impute censored stage-2 outcomes via constrained donor matching

- [`matchpotential_DTR()`](https://ericanto0.github.io/DRMLSurv/reference/matchpotential_DTR.md)
  : Construct matched counterfactual outcomes for a (single-stage)
  treatment contrast

- [`my_score.Surv()`](https://ericanto0.github.io/DRMLSurv/reference/my_score.Surv.md)
  : Compute a value score under a candidate treatment rule

- [`policy_summary_metrics()`](https://ericanto0.github.io/DRMLSurv/reference/policy_summary_metrics.md)
  : Summarize policy performance metrics for a two-stage treatment
  regime

- [`predict(`*`<Drmatch>`*`)`](https://ericanto0.github.io/DRMLSurv/reference/predict.Drmatch.md)
  : Predict optimal treatment decisions from a fitted Drmatch object

- [`print(`*`<summary.Drmatch>`*`)`](https://ericanto0.github.io/DRMLSurv/reference/print.summary.Drmatch.md)
  : Print a summary.Drmatch object

- [`propensityplot()`](https://ericanto0.github.io/DRMLSurv/reference/propensityplot.md)
  : Plot propensity (or censoring) score overlap by group

- [`rfdtr()`](https://ericanto0.github.io/DRMLSurv/reference/rfdtr.md) :
  Tune and fit a random-forest DTR policy model with (optional)
  cross-validation

- [`summary(`*`<Drmatch>`*`)`](https://ericanto0.github.io/DRMLSurv/reference/summary.Drmatch.md)
  :

  Summarize a fitted `Drmatch` object on new data
